summary.lv: Intrum Global Technologies Rīgā meklē Development Manager, kas vada aptuveni 150 inženieru lielu organizāciju, attīsta high-performance inženiermākslas kultūru, mentorē produktu īpašniekus un Agile coachus un virza AI transformāciju.
summary.en: Intrum Global Technologies in Riga is hiring a Development Manager to lead an engineering organization of roughly 150 people, build a high-performance culture, coach Product Owners and Agile leaders, and drive an AI transformation across the group.
